rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski, Based on Morphisec report by Michael Gorelik (@smgoreli)
rule_metadata.title: Hyper-V Virtual Machine Discovery Shutdown via Powershell Cmdlets

rules.rule_text:
title: Hyper-V Virtual Machine Discovery Shutdown via Powershell Cmdlets
id: d42df972-2f45-44b0-8566-3de71b9ed3e9
status: experimental
description: Detects powershell process used to find and shut down local Hyper-V VMs
  using the Stop-VM cmdlet, as documented in the 2024 Morphisec report on Cicada3301
  ransomware.
references:
- https://blog.morphisec.com/cicada3301-ransomware-threat-analysis
related:
- id: 42d36aa1-3240-4db0-8257-e0118dcdd9cd
  type: derived
author: Micah Babinski, Based on Morphisec report by Michael Gorelik (@smgoreli)
date: 2024-09-07
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.impact
- attack.t1578
- attack.t1578.003
- attack.t1529
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
  - Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
  - OriginalFileName: powershell.exe
  selection_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - Get-VM
    - Stop-VM
    - -Force
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
